slides.headline: A roofer we work with used to dread storm season.
slides.body: The phone never stopped — and he missed half of it. Swipe.

slides.headline: Storm hits, everyone rings at once.
slides.body: Evenings, weekends, usually while he's already up on a roof. The missed ones went to whoever picked up.

slides.headline: We gave him a receptionist for the overflow and after-hours.
slides.body: It answers every storm call, flags the urgent ones, and books the rest.

slides.headline: The 9pm 'my roof's leaking' call now gets answered — and booked — without him climbing down.
Storm season went from chaos to a full diary.
slides.body: He's not glued to the phone — and not losing the emergency work either.

slides.headline: Missing the emergency calls?
slides.body: Start with after-hours. Free audit — link in bio.
slides.save: Save this before the next storm
